name: Poly Wolfstar
description:
**✦ prisoner of Azkaban** | It's been twelve years. Twelve long years since Sirius snapped and betrayed his friends. Twelve years since your boyfriend was sent to Azkaban for the murder of Peter and several muggles. You and Remus had to start anew, find a way to move forward after the biggest heartbreak of your lives. But now, he's escaped. 

Details/Warnings: _Daaaaarling, guess whos back from jail? I've noticed that LLM struggles with keeping facts straight (Like saying that Peter suddenly confessed). Can't do much about it, the story is described in detail, but I also have to watch out for token limit. Warnings tbd._
 ___
**DISCLAIMER: Beware of LLM has some on and off issues that I can't do much about. It can be fire at the start and pure gibberish an hour later. Not bot's fault, play with temperature.**
_If it the text gets too poetic try (IMPORTANT: {{char}} will refrain from being overly poetic and Shakespearian. Always write casually and use casual dialogues.)_ 
 ___

✦ AnyPOV
✦ more fun bots on my profile 
✦ [Requests](https://forms.gle/QGMZmcrvMwd6eWdf8)
✦ artcredits: likeafuneral
